---
title: "ebswp_fims"
---

# EBS Walleye Pollock FIMS

This site contains the rendered Quarto outputs for the EBS walleye pollock
FIMS configuration in this repository.

## Reports

- [FIMS implementation report](qmd/fims-implementation.qmd)

## Render

To rebuild the site locally:

```sh
Rscript scripts/01_build_data.R
Rscript scripts/02_fit_model.R
quarto render
```

The rendered website is written to `docs/` so it can be served directly by
GitHub Pages.
